主编","author_id":"","book_id":"7052639068496071694","book_name":"山海经：上古洪荒时代最古老奇书","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"129.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":941,\"name\":\"文学经典\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=941\u0026name=文学经典\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":116,\"name\":\"国学\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=116\u0026name=国学\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":525,\"name\":\"古籍\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=525\u0026name=古籍\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":975,\"name\":\"传统文化\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=975\u0026name=传统文化\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7521331481998806078","read_count":"22199","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"214644"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"832","tags":"文学经典,国学,古籍,传统文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ded6b3e15fca49308f47c693f78efc4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779289194\u0026x-signature=TOv7GnnC%2F6jqadDEy3WJKcMiM3k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603212259532E6DDD0F501577EF9BE3\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2462,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5973,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5536},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374035255466935049","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得这本《山海经》（通读版）真的很不错！里面的故事很有趣，而且前面还有白话文，读起来很轻松。我特别喜欢里面那些神话角色，比如刑天，他的性格好坚韧，即使头颅被砍下也毫不畏惧，继续战斗，真的太酷了！还有精卫，她的经历让我很感动，坚持不懈地用石头填海，这种精神值得我们学习。这本书的注释也很详细，让我对原文有了更深入的理解。总之，我觉得这是一本很有意义的书，推荐给你哦！","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":6,"text":"山海经","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410519477EF9BE3%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227374035255466935049%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227052639068496071694%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714570909,"group_id":"7052639068496071694","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢就争取，得到就珍惜，错过就忘记，生活其实就这么简单。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0L0rM5B/QGF+J99XxgF9Oi5WnxUs7uKRk+Z6H6rCByb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e8f81da7f3c8447d851aadc748879e81~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776620052\u0026x-signature=Z90J%2FbEj3olOSoAC%2FP%2BM4xnTpKQ%3D","user_id":"3562885050270398","user_name":"趁醉独饮痛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3562885050270398","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7052639068496071694","book_info":{"abstract":"这部流传千年的上古奇书，隐藏着无数不为人知的秘密和惊人谜团。本书前面部分是白话文，可以简单直观地看懂里面的故事，重要的部分，都已经有标注整理。后半部分是原文注释，可以参照原文细品。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9ded6b3e15fca49
